description: Configure the Wazuh manager in the `wazuh.manager` container to periodically audit listening network ports using the Command Monitoring Wodle subsystem. The configuration in `/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf` must execute the command `ss -tlnp` every 300 seconds with the tag `port-audit`. Ensure the module is configured to run on start, has a 30-second timeout, does not ignore output, and that the manager service is restarted to apply the changes.
